input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8602 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an API drift issue in the existing test: QualifiedTypeBinder.hear changed from a three-argument call to a two-argument call in the resolved dependency path.

The artifact has deprecated legacy wrapper APIs and optional TestNG/OSGi/SLF4J references, but these are not prerequisites for meaningful Guice/Sisu bean scanning, binding, locator, and class-space coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No setup beyond the normal generated test scaffold is needed: the resolved artifact is an in-process legacy Sisu/Eclipse Sisu wrapper, and its required CDI, Guice no_aop, and Eclipse Sisu dependencies resolve transitively.
